preamble: The diphthongization of [ʌ] to [oʊ] (or [ou]) involves the addition of a rounded back off-glide. This transformation represents a vowel-to-diphthong pathway, though documented instances of [ʌ] specifically becoming [oʊ] are limited in linguistic literature.

examples.note: Theoretical example of vowel diphthongization with rounding and backing; not well-documented as a historical sound change.
